description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.5.7-alpine Docker image and runs a before_script that executes `apk update`, `apk add ruby-dev alpine-sdk`, and `gem install rubocop -v "0.93.1" -N`. Define a single stage named test and add a job called rubocop in that stage that runs the `rubocop` command. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
